---
title: "Alice F. S. Poole"
---

## Alice F. S. Poole

**Dates:** (b. Newland, Gloucestershire 1850)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

She was a Gosling as ‘Snowbird’ in 1876.  She was living at Uffington, Faringdon, on income from Funds without a servant, with her mother Catherine Poole (b. 1807/8), in whose memory a chalice was given to Uffington Church; she became an associate of the Wantage sisterhood in 1869; she later became a governess and at the time of the 1881 census was living in Camberwell with her sister Harriet Poole (b. Mansfield, Nottingham 1843/4), also a governess. [<i>Victoria County History</i>; information from Wantage; census]

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 13 th [1872]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
